CustomField.description: When checked, the capability configurator prompts the user to select a Salesforce object (SObject) before configuring this action. Used for record-centric actions like create, update, and get record details.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check for record-based actions (create, update, query) that need an SObject context. Uncheck for actions that operate independently of a specific object type (e.g., send notification, run flow).
CustomField.label: Requires SObject Selection
